title: Lafocuse Silent Alarm Clock Bedside Battery Powered Non Ticking, 4 Inch Black Analogue Alarm Clocks with Night Light Snooze, Small Retro Metal Desk Table Clock for Heavy Sleepers Seniors Bedroom
features: Silent Non Ticking: The bedside alarm clock is equipped with a silent and precise quartz clock movement, which provides you a quiet environment without ticking sound and ensures accurate time. After inserting 2 AA battery, you can put it on bedside or office and it won't affect your sleeping or working. (Note: Battery is not provided.)

Easy to Read: Featured with classic 3D black numbers, this analogue alarm clock is easy to read time even for seniors. Press the white button on the clock back, the manual night light will glow across the entire dial so that you can get time in the dark.
Snooze Function: When the alarm rings, you can also press the white button to pause alarm and get a snooze time. After 5 minutes, the alarm will ring again to wake you up.

Broad Application: Dial diameter in 4"(10.5cm). It's a practical and stylish addition to the bedside, nightstand, shelf and desk in bedroom. The mini simple style also makes it a great choice for decoration and a special gift for heavy sleepers, travelers, friends and your families on Christmas, Fathers' Day and other festivals.

Alarm Time Setting: Rotate the small gears on the back of the small clock to set time and alarm. It's an analogue alarm clock so the alarm time you set may not be so accurate. The alarm time error can be up to 12 minutes so it's possible for the alarm to start ringing just before or after the time you want to set it for.
